message:
refactor: remove underscore-prefix suppression from used variables

Clippy's unused_variables lint was previously silenced by prefixing
variable names with underscores (_err, _method, _path, _source_label,
_reason) even though these variables were actively used in tracing
macros and debug formatting.

Removes the underscore prefix from all five files so the variables
have their natural names, making the code clearer and allowing
clippy to correctly detect genuinely unused variables in the future:

  - decoding.rs: _err → err in block decode error path
  - distributed/recovery.rs: _reason → reason in rejected symbol warn
  - messaging/jetstream.rs: _err → err in unsubscribe failure warn
  - runtime/waker.rs: _source_label → source_label in wake trace
  - web/middleware.rs: _method → method, _path → path in request
    tracing (start, 5xx warning, and success debug paths)

No behavioral change — all variables were already used.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
